query:
SELECT externalId, serviceType, planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId, discoveryNotes
FROM services
WHERE externalId IN ('SG3D608','SSHKYHN','SSCLR2F4','S1220','S1301','IPTEL-AB0','S0467','S1315')
ORDER BY externalId;
